text.title: Strategy Basics Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Mission and vision statements are interchanged or fused.
antipattern.fix: Force separate term entries with anti-examples; require both in any strategy artefact.

antipattern.symptom: OKR examples use verbs like 'improve' or 'enhance' without numeric KR.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treats OKR as wish list.
antipattern.fix: Force KR to include numeric delta + deadline.

antipattern.symptom: Glossary entries blur strategy and tactics.
antipattern.fix: Add a per-term anti_example showing the collapse to guard against.
